packageRules.description: Bump react-router, react-router-dom, and @remix-run/router together. Updating only one leaves the others pinned to an older exact version in the lockfile, which npm cannot dedupe against the bumped package - producing two separate copies of react-router with two distinct DataRouterContext instances, and a hard crash on every page (see mitodl/lehrer#75).
setuptools is deliberately pinned <82 for pkg_resources (see pip_package_lists comments); pip/wheel are managed manually. Renovate must not bump these in build_manifest.yaml.
